reference: I have abdominal pain and cramps when I masturbate, not at first but about five to ten minutes into it. After ejaculating, the pain slowly goes away in about thirty minutes. I am a fifty-year-old male. I had a colonoscopy on February nineteen. All was normal, and the pain started about two weeks ago.
text: I have abdominal pain and cramps when I masturbate. Not at first, but about 5 to 10 minutes into it. After ejaculating, the pain goes away in about 30 minutes. I am a 50-year-old man. I had a colonoscopy on February 19. All was normal and the pain started about two weeks ago.
